evidence_quotes.quote: protection against games that has been destroyed or are no longer available
limit the dark patterns that have invaded the gaming industry in the last 10-20 years, or at limit it with regulation to ensure that the negative impact of these systems are not too harmful.

paragraphs.text: As a citizen of EU I really hope that this initiative would include protection against games that has been destroyed or are no longer available (I have personal experience with MAG and The Crew, but there are hundred or even thousand of others). There are other initiatives around the world looking at games that have not yet been published (future games), but considering the vast amount of games and the impact it has had on people and cultures around the world it is really a big risk if we allow these games to be destroyed. Additionally, it would be great if we can limit the dark patterns that have invaded the gaming industry in the last 10-20 years, or at limit it with regulation to ensure that the negative impact of these systems are not too harmful.
